prompt: A user just said: 'ingest /tmp/knowledge-test/TestLarge/raw/articles/分布式事务.md'. Follow the ingest skill to process this raw article into the TestLarge wiki. Save step-by-step log to transcript.md and final report to report.md.
assertions: The agent read the raw article /tmp/knowledge-test/TestLarge/raw/articles/分布式事务.md
The agent created wiki pages in TestLarge/wiki/ (at least a summary page, possibly concept pages)
The agent updated TestLarge/wiki/index.md with new entries
The agent updated TestLarge/wiki/log.md with an ingest record
The agent moved the raw file to TestLarge/raw/archive/
The agent checked qmd collection existence (qmd collection list | grep knowledge-testlarge)
The agent ran qmd update for the TestLarge collection
The report mentions the qmd index update
